title: astragalus sterilis
intro: Astragalus sterilis, also known as the sterile milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus sterilis include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced stress and fatigue, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Astragalus sterilis can be prepared in various forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
